parents.subject: LU-17638 util: remove newer lnetctl export handling

commit.subject: LU-16831 tests: specify sanity-pfl/1c stripe size
commit.message:
LU-16831 tests: specify sanity-pfl/1c stripe size

Fix sanity-pfl.sh test_1c to specify 1MB stripe_size when it expects
the specific number of stripes to be created based on component size.

Fixes: a250ecb959 ("LU-16831 lfs: limit stripe count for component size")
Fixes: ea18d7da59 ("LU-10465 lov: increase default stripe size to 4MB")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-pfl clientversion=EXA6
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ibb9ab2c201d1b2f5adaca97eb9b17684a9b718d5
